displayName.japanese: 細かい条件は読まないで

description.brazilian: Pegue um empréstimo.
description.english: Take a loan
description.french: Faire un emprunt
description.german: Nimm einen Kredit auf.
description.japanese: ローンを組む
description.schinese: 借一笔贷款
description.spanish: Pide un préstamo.

description.brazilian: Ganhe um superprêmio.
description.english: Win a super jackpot
description.french: Obtenir un Super Jackpot
description.german: Gewinne einen Super-Jackpot.
description.japanese: スーパージャックポットを当てる
description.schinese: 中一次超级头奖
description.spanish: Gana un superjackpot.

description.brazilian: Quebre 2 pratos seguidos.
description.english: Crack 2 plates in a row
description.french: Briser deux assiettes de suite
description.german: Zerbrich 2 Teller in Folge.
description.japanese: 連続で皿を2枚割る
description.schinese: 连续打破 2 个盘子
description.spanish: Rompe 2 platos seguidos.

description.brazilian: Ganhe o maior prêmio no primeiro bilhete que raspar.
description.english: Get a jackpot on the first ticket you scratch
description.french: Obtenir un Jackpot dès le premier ticket gratté
description.german: Knacke den Jackpot mit dem ersten freigerubbelten Los.
description.japanese: 最初のくじでジャックポットを当てる
description.koreana: 첫 번째로 긁은 티켓에서 잭팟에 당첨되세요
description.polish: Traf jackpot na pierwszym zdrapywanym kuponie.
description.russian: Выиграйте джекпот в первом же билете.
description.schinese: 刮的第一张卡就中头奖
description.spanish: Consigue un jackpot con el primer boleto que rasque.

description.brazilian: Descarte um bilhete com maior prêmio.
description.english: Trash a Jackpot ticket
description.french: Jeter un ticket Jackpot à la poubelle
description.german: Wirf eine Jackpot-Los in den Mülleimer.
description.japanese: ジャックポットくじを捨てる
description.russian: Выбросьте билет с джекпотом в мусор.
description.schinese: 把中了头奖的刮刮卡扔进垃圾箱
description.spanish: Tira un boleto con jackpot.

description.brazilian: Alcance o final em 30 min ou menos após o prestígio.
description.english: Reach the ending in 30 min or less after prestige
description.french: Atteindre la fin en moins de 30 minutes après avoir débloqué le prestige
description.german: Erreiche das Ende in 30 Min. oder weniger nach dem Prestige.
description.japanese: プレステージ後30分以内にエンディングに到達する
description.polish: Dotrzyj do zakończenia w maks. 30 minut po zyskaniu prestiżu.
description.russian: Достигните финала в течение 30 минут, после того как получили престиж.
description.schinese: 在进阶后 30 分钟或更短时间内达到结局
description.spanish: Llega al final en 30 minutos o menos tras el prestigio.

displayName.japanese: ギャンブルは身を滅ぼす
displayName.russian: Азартные игры до добра не доведут

description.brazilian: Perca a vida.
description.english: Die
description.french: Mourir
description.german: Stirb
description.japanese: 死亡
description.schinese: 死亡
description.spanish: Muere.

description.brazilian: Perca a vida 2 vezes.
description.english: Die twice
description.french: Mourir 2 fois
description.german: Stirb zweimal.
description.japanese: 2回死亡
description.schinese: 死亡两次
description.spanish: Muere dos veces.

description.brazilian: Perca a vida 3 vezes.
description.english: Die three times
description.french: Mourir 3 fois
description.german: Stirb dreimal.
description.japanese: 3回死亡
description.schinese: 死亡三次
description.spanish: Muere tres veces.

description.brazilian: Perca a vida 4 vezes.
description.english: Die four times
description.french: Mourir 4 fois
description.german: Stirb viermal.
description.japanese: 4回死亡
description.schinese: 死亡四次
description.spanish: Muere cuatro veces.

description.brazilian: Raspe Tudo ou Nada sem perder a vida.
description.english: Scratch final chance without dying
description.french: Gratter la Dernière chance sans mourir
description.german: Rubble die letzte Chance frei, ohne zu sterben.
description.japanese: 一度も死亡せず最後のチャンスを削る
description.schinese: 刮完放手一搏后没死
description.spanish: Rasca el boleto Última Oportunidad sin morir.

description.brazilian: Deixe a Ofélia te levar à falência.
description.english: Have mundo bankrupt you
description.french: Tout perdre à cause de Mundo
description.german: Sorge dafür, dass du wegen Mundo pleitegehst.
description.japanese: タマのせいで破産する
description.polish: Pozwól Mundo doprowadzić cię do bankructwa.
description.schinese: 让蒙多把你搞到破产
description.spanish: Que Mundo te lleve a la bancarrota.

description.brazilian: Faça a Ofélia raspar um superprêmio.
description.english: Have mundo scratch a super jackpot
description.french: Obtenir un Super Jackpot grâce à Mundo
description.german: Sorge dafür, dass Mundo einen Super-Jackpot freirubbelt.
description.japanese: タマがスーパージャックポットを削り当てる
description.schinese: 让蒙多刮出超级头奖
description.spanish: Que Mundo gane un superjackpot.

description.brazilian: Ganhe um maior prêmio no Trampo.
description.english: Win a jackpot on Day Job
description.french: Gagner le jackpot sur Métro, boulot, dodo
description.german: Gewinne einen Jackpot im Beruf.
description.japanese: 毎日の仕事でジャックポットを当てる
description.schinese: 在日常工作中赢得头奖
description.spanish: Gana un jackpot en Tarea diaria.

displayName.french: Un de chaque, s'il vous plaît

description.brazilian: Coloque todas as raspadinhas diferentes dos 4 catálogos na mesa ao mesmo tempo.
description.english: Have all different tickets from all 4 catalogues on the table at once
description.french: Poser tous les tickets des 4 catalogues sur la table en même temps
description.german: Sorge dafür, dass alle Lose aus allen 4 Katalogen einmal auf dem Tisch liegen.
description.japanese: 4つのカタログすべてから異なるくじを同時にテーブルに置く
description.koreana: 4개 카탈로그의 서로 다른 티켓을 동시에 테이블에 올려놓으세요
description.polish: Miej na stole po jednym kuponie ze wszystkich 4 katalogów.
description.russian: Выложите на стол все уникальные билеты из всех 4 каталогов одновременно.
description.schinese: 将来自所有 4 个类别的所有不同刮刮卡同时放在桌子上
description.spanish: Ten todos los distintos boletos de los 4 catálogos en la mesa a la vez.

description.brazilian: Ganhe um maior prêmio em todas as raspadinhas de todos os 4 catálogos.
description.english: Win a jackpot on all tickets from all 4 catalogues
description.french: Gagner le jackpot sur tous les tickets de chacun des 4 catalogues
description.german: Gewinne einen Jackpot mit allen Losen aus allen 4 Kategorien.
description.japanese: 4つのカタログのくじ全部でジャックポットを当てる
description.polish: Zdobądź jackpot ze wszystkich kuponów z 4 katalogów.
description.russian: Выиграйте джекпот на всех билетах из всех 4 каталогов.
description.schinese: 在所有来自 4 个类别的刮刮卡上赢得头奖
description.spanish: Gana un jackpot con todos los boletos de los 4 catálogos.

description.brazilian: Raspe o Tudo ou Nada com um catálogo ainda na mesa.
description.english: Scratch final chance with a catalogue still on the table
description.french: Gratter la Dernière chance avec un catalogue toujours posé sur la table
description.german: Rubble die letzte Chance frei, während sich noch ein Katalog auf dem Tisch befindet.
description.japanese: カタログがテーブルに残ったままラストチャンスを削る
description.koreana: 카탈로그가 아직 테이블에 있는 상태에서 파이널 찬스를 긁으세요
description.polish: Zdrap ostatnią szansę, gdy na stole wciąż znajduje się katalog.
description.russian: Сотрите последний шанс, пока каталог еще на столе.
description.schinese: 在仍有类别在桌上的情况下刮开放手一搏
description.spanish: Rasca el boleto Última oportunidad con un catálogo todavía en la mesa.

displayName.spanish: Gasta todo el dinero del mundo

description.brazilian: Compre algo mais caro do que a economia mundial.
description.english: Buy something more expensive than the global economy
description.french: Acheter quelque chose valant plus que toute l'économie mondiale
description.german: Kaufe etwas, das teurer ist als alles Geld der Welt.
description.japanese: 世界経済より高いものを買う
description.koreana: 세계 경제보다 더 비싼 무언가를 구매하세요
description.polish: Kup coś wartego więcej niż cała światowa gospodarka.
description.russian: Купите что-нибудь по цене, превышающей объем глобальной экономики.
description.schinese: 购买比全球经济价值还要昂贵的东西
description.spanish: Compra algo más caro que la economía global.

description.brazilian: Ganhe 1Sx enquanto fica ausente por pelo menos 5 min.
description.english: Make 1Sx while idle for at least 5 min
description.french: Générer 1Sx en ne faisant rien pendant au moins 5 minutes
description.german: Verdiene 1Sx, während du mindestens 5 Minuten lang untätig bist.
description.japanese: 5分以上放置して1Sx稼ぐ
description.polish: Zdobądź 1Sx, nie wykonując żadnych czynności w grze przez co najmniej 5 minut.
description.russian: Заработайте 1Sx, ничего не делая как минимум 5 минут.
description.schinese: 至少持续空闲 5 分钟，并达成 1Sx
description.spanish: Consigue un x21 sin hacer nada durante al menos 5 minutos.

description.brazilian: Ganhe um prêmio que seja pelo menos 1000 vezes maior do que o custo da raspadinha.
description.english: Win a prize that is 1000 times larger than the ticket cost
description.french: Remporter un prix d'une valeur au moins 1 000 fois plus élevé que le coût du ticket
description.german: Gewinne einen Preis, dessen Wert die Loskosten 1.000-mal übersteigt.
description.japanese: くじ価格の1000倍の賞金を当てる
description.polish: Zdobądź nagrodę o wartości 1000 razy większej od ceny kuponu.
description.russian: Выиграйте приз в 1000 раз больше, чем цена его билета.
description.schinese: 赢得的奖金达到刮刮卡成本的 1000 倍
description.spanish: Gana un premio que sea 1000 veces mayor que el coste del boleto.

description.brazilian: Ganhe um prêmio que seja pelo menos 10.000 vezes maior do que o custo da raspadinha.
description.english: Win a prize that is 10.000 times larger than the ticket cost
description.french: Remporter un prix d'une valeur au moins 10 000 fois plus élevé que le coût du ticket
description.german: Gewinne einen Preis, dessen Wert die Loskosten 10.000-mal übersteigt.
description.japanese: くじ価格の10000倍의賞金を当てる
description.polish: Zdobądź nagrodę o wartości 10 000 razy większej od ceny kuponu.
description.russian: Выиграйте приз в 10 000 раз больше, чем цена его билета.
description.schinese: 赢得的奖金达到刮刮卡成本的 10000 倍
description.spanish: Gana un premio que sea 10 000 veces mayor que el coste del boleto.

displayName.japanese: ハイレベルギャンブル

description.french: Remporter un prix d'une valeur au moins 100 000 fois plus élevé que le coût du ticket

description.spanish: Gana un premio que sea 100 000 veces mayor que el coste del boleto.

displayName.japanese: クリッカーミニゲーム

description.brazilian: Tenha uma pilha de 100 ou mais bilhetes raspados no raspabot.
description.english: Have a stack of 100 or more scratched tickets in Scratch Bot
description.french: Empiler au moins 100 tickets grattés dans l'autogratteur
description.german: Sorge dafür, dass du mit dem Rubbel-Bot über einen Stapel aus 100 oder mehr freigerubbelten Losen verfügst.
description.japanese: 削り済みのくじをスクラッチボットに100枚以上積む
description.koreana: 스크래치 봇에 긁은 티켓을 100장 이상 쌓으세요
description.polish: Miej stos co najmniej 100 zdrapanych kuponów w zdrapkobocie.
description.russian: Поместите в бот-стёрку 100 или более стертых билетов.
description.schinese: 在刮刮机器人中积累 100 张或更多的刮刮卡
description.spanish: Ten un montón de 100 o más boletos rascados en el rascabot.

description.brazilian: Comece com todas as engenhocas disponíveis.
description.english: Start with all automation gadgets unlocked
description.french: Commencer avec tous les gadgets
description.german: Starte mit allen Gadgets.
description.japanese: すべてのガジェットをアンロックした状態で開始
description.koreana: 모든 장비가 잠금 해제된 상태로 시작하세요
description.schinese: 初始解锁所有辅助道具
description.spanish: Empieza con todos los artefactos desbloqueados.

description.brazilian: Compre todas as melhorias de prestígio.
description.english: Buy all prestige upgrades
description.french: Acheter toutes les améliorations Prestige
description.german: Kaufe alle Prestige-Aufwertungen.
description.japanese: すべてのプレステージアップグレードを購入
description.schinese: 购买所有进阶升级
description.spanish: Compra todas las mejoras de prestigio.

displayName.japanese: ナイトマーケット訪問

description.english: Buy and equip a cosmetic
description.french: Acheter et équiper une amélioration cosmétique
description.german: Kaufe einen kosmetischen Gegenstand und rüste ihn aus.

description.brazilian: Obtenha $2000 sem comprar uma raspadinha.
description.english: Have $2000 without buying a scratch-off
description.french: Remporter 2 000 $ sans acheter de tickets à gratter
description.german: Erarbeite 2.000 $, ohne ein Rubbellos zu kaufen.
description.japanese: スクラッチを買わずに$2000所持
description.russian: Накопите 2000$ не купив ни одного билета.
description.schinese: 无需购买刮刮卡就获得了 2000 美元

description.brazilian: Obtenha $20M sem comprar uma raspadinha.
description.english: Have $20M without buying a scratch-off
description.french: Remporter 20 M$ sans acheter de tickets à gratter

description.japanese: スクラッチを買わずに$2000万所持

description.schinese: 无需购买刮刮卡就获得了 2000 万美元

description.brazilian: Crie uma alma artificial.
description.english: Create an artificial soul
description.french: Créer une âme artificielle
description.german: Erschaffe eine künstliche Seele.
description.japanese: 人工の魂を作る
description.schinese: 创造一个人造灵魂
description.spanish: Crea un alma artificial.

description.brazilian: Use magia para raspar um bilhete.
description.english: Use magic to scratch a ticket
description.french: Utiliser la magie pour gratter un ticket
description.german: Benutze Magie, um ein Lose freizurubbeln.
description.japanese: 魔法でくじを削る
description.schinese: 使用魔法刮开卡
description.spanish: Usa magia para rascar un boleto.

displayName.french: Machine à voyager dans le temps

description.brazilian: Melhore o ovo temporizador para a velocidade x5.
description.english: Upgrade Egg Timer to x5 speed
description.french: Améliorer le minuteur pour accélérer le temps 5 fois
description.german: Werte die Eieruhr zum 5-fachen Tempo auf.
description.japanese: エッグタイマーを5倍速度にアップグレード
description.schinese: 将煮蛋计时器的运行速度提升至五倍
description.spanish: Mejora el temporizador de huevo a la velocidad x5.

description.brazilian: Entregue a Chance Final premiada para a corporação
description.english: Give the winning Final Chance to the corporation
description.french: Donnez la Dernière chance gagnante à la corporation
description.german: Gib die gewonnene Letzte Chance an den Konzern ab
description.japanese: 当選した「ラストチャンス」を企業に譲渡する
description.schinese: 将获胜的“最后机会”交给公司
description.spanish: Entrega la Última Oportunidade ganadora a la corporación

description.brazilian: Obtenha todas as conquistas do jogo.
description.english: Get all achievements in the game
description.french: Remporter tous les succès du jeu
description.german: Erlange alle Erfolge im Spiel.
description.japanese: すべての実績を獲得
description.schinese: 在游戏中获取所有成就
description.spanish: Consigue todos los logros del juego.
